prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 smartphone selfie that looks like a real casual high-quality photo taken with a modern phone, suitable for a social media profile or story. The subject is a friendly young Japanese woman centered close to the camera, photographed from slightly above chest level with her arms subtly visible at the bottom as if holding the phone. She has dark brown hair tied back neatly with wispy bangs and a few loose flyaway strands, smooth natural skin, large brown eyes, soft pink lips, minimal fresh makeup, and a gentle approachable smile while looking directly into the lens. She wears a crisp white long-sleeve collared shirt under a dark navy office vest with one visible button and a pocket, plus a large tied neck scarf in teal, navy, green, and white diagonal stripes. The background is an indoor reception or service counter area with an off-white wall, partial large Japanese wall text visible on the right reading 受付, and a thin turquoise horizontal line beneath it. Use bright even indoor lighting, natural phone-camera sharpness, slight wide-angle lens distortion, realistic skin texture, subtle JPEG compression, no studio lighting, no glamour advertising look, no heavy retouching, no extra people, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a vertical 9:16 smartphone selfie that looks like a real casual high-quality photo taken with a modern phone, suitable for a social media profile or story. The subject is a friendly young Japanese woman centered close to the camera, photographed from slightly above chest level with her arms subtly visible at the bottom as if holding the phone. She has dark brown hair tied back neatly with wispy bangs and a few loose flyaway strands, smooth natural skin, large brown eyes, soft pink lips, minimal fresh makeup, and a gentle approachable smile while looking directly into the lens. She wears a crisp white long-sleeve collared shirt under a dark navy office vest with one visible button and a pocket, plus a large tied neck scarf in teal, navy, green, and white diagonal stripes. The background is an indoor reception or service counter area with an off-white wall, partial large Japanese wall text visible on the right reading 受付, and a thin turquoise horizontal line beneath it. Use bright even indoor lighting, natural phone-camera sharpness, slight wide-angle lens distortion, realistic skin texture, subtle JPEG compression, no studio lighting, no glamour advertising look, no heavy retouching, no extra people, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张 9:16 的竖屏智能手机自拍，看起来就像是用现代手机拍摄的高质量休闲照片，适合社交媒体个人资料或故事。主体是一位友好的年轻 日本 女性，居中靠近镜头，从胸部上方略微俯拍，手臂在底部隐约可见，仿佛正在拿着手机。她留着 深棕色头发，整齐地扎在脑后，留着几缕轻盈的刘海和几根散落的发丝，皮肤光滑自然，有着棕色大眼睛、柔和的粉色嘴唇、清新的淡妆，直视镜头时带着温柔且平易近人的微笑。她穿着一件干练的白色长袖翻领衬衫，外面套着一件深蓝色办公背心，背心上有一个可见的纽扣和口袋，脖子上系着一条 青色、海军蓝、绿色和白色斜条纹 的大领巾。背景是室内接待处或服务台区域，墙面为灰白色，右侧可见部分大型日语墙面文字 受付，下方有一条细细的绿松石色水平线。使用明亮均匀的室内光线，呈现手机摄像头的自然清晰度，带有轻微的广角镜头畸变，皮肤纹理真实，带有细微的 JPEG 压缩感，无影棚灯光，无广告修图感，无过度后期，画面中无其他人物，无水印。
